commands_run: tmp=$(mktemp); printf '%s\n' 'CLI production smoke verifies attributed editable content.' > "$tmp"; entity="codex-cli-smoke-$(date +%s)"; node cli/bin/coh.mjs --api-url https://api.coherencycoin.com content set page "$entity" --lang en --file "$tmp" --by codex-cli-smoke-author --title "Codex CLI smoke"; node cli/bin/coh.mjs --api-url https://api.coherencycoin.com content views page "$entity"; rm -f "$tmp"
git fetch origin main && git rebase origin/main
failure_reason: Production CLI smoke found that top-level flag extraction consumed content --lang, so coh content set printed usage instead of writing attributed entity views. The follow-up preserves command-level --lang for content and translate while keeping global locale --lang before the command.
